hand_edits: FORBIDDEN — this file is regenerated. Edit the code, or the DECLARED artifact it derives from, and re-run the regeneration command.

metric_definitions.compile_edges_G1: unique (source, target) pairs where the import is at MODULE LEVEL. `from P import n` yields an edge to P (P/__init__.py must execute) AND to P.n when n is itself a module.
metric_definitions.lazy_edges: unique (source, target) pairs where the import sits inside a FunctionDef. Materializes only if the function is CALLED.
metric_definitions.lazy_edges_lateral: lazy edges where level(target) == level(source). NOT inversions.
metric_definitions.lazy_edges_strictly_upward: lazy edges where level(target) > level(source) — TRUE layering inversions, legal ONLY because deferred to call time.
metric_definitions.level: longest-path depth over the SCC-CONDENSATION of G1 (a DAG by construction). level(X)=0 if X imports nothing internal; else 1+max(level(targets)).
